title: Income tests
description: How to complete the Income tests section of your return using myTax.

child_links.title: Income tests 2011
child_links.description: Complete the income tests so we can work out your eligibility for a number of tax offsets and benefits.

child_links.title: IT1 - Total reportable fringe benefits amount 2011
child_links.description: Complete question IT1 to include any fringe benefits amounts you received from your employer.

child_links.title: IT2 - Reportable employer super contributions 2011
child_links.description: Complete IT2 to include any reportable employer superannuation contributions you received.

child_links.title: IT3 - Tax-free government pensions 2011
child_links.description: Complete question IT3 to include certain tax-free government pensions or benefits you received.

child_links.title: IT4 - Target foreign income 2011
child_links.description: Complete question IT4 to include target foreign income you received.

child_links.title: IT5 - Net financial investment loss 2011
child_links.description: Complete question IT5 to include a net loss from any financial investments you owned.

child_links.title: IT6 - Net rental property loss 2011
child_links.description: Complete question IT6 to include the net loss from any rental property you owned.

child_links.title: IT7 - Child support you paid 2011
child_links.description: Complete question IT7 to include child support you paid.
